name: Brambles Limited
analysis: BXB has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 25% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$19.6400, stop A$17.5923, target A$22.2200 (1.26:1) — then trail it.
